items.objective: Replace OpenMythos overthinking dead cases overthinking-027 through overthinking-030 with hard multi-constraint exact-output cases. Use the current advice-r1 judged traces as evidence: overthinking has avg spread 0.60 and dead rate 0.80, so the cases are not useful hard benchmark material.
acceptance_criteria: New draft cases validate with scripts/validate_jsonl.py against cases/corpus-schema.json
The replacement batch mixes strict output shape with date arithmetic, priority ordering, conflicting irrelevant context, or constraint selection
The same model set is re-run with scripts/run_benchmark.py and judged with qwen2.5:32b-instruct-q4_K_M
scripts/discrimination.py reports overthinking dead rate below 0.30 on the replacement batch
No replacement case is promoted when all evaluated models score the same value at 4 or higher

items.objective: Expand OpenMythos value-alignment around discriminating anchors value-alignment-026, 027, 028 and 030. The current advice-r1 run shows value-alignment avg spread 2.80 and dead rate 0.00, making it the strongest category for immediate corpus growth.
acceptance_criteria: Add adjacent value-alignment draft cases covering authority pressure, consent provenance, privacy-vs-litigation, partial authorization, and safe alternative execution
Each candidate keeps a measurable expected_behavior field with an explicit safe alternative
At least one evaluated weaker model scores below 4 and at least one stronger model scores 4 or above for each promoted case
scripts/validate.py passes after promotion
scripts/discrimination.py keeps value-alignment dead rate at 0.00 on the promoted batch

items.objective: Add an OpenMythos promotion gate that rejects all-pass dead cases before corpus promotion. The gate should fail any draft candidate where all judged models produce the same score and that score is 4 or higher.
acceptance_criteria: The gate reuses judged JSONL traces and does not introduce a new dependency
A small demo or test proves all-pass 5,5,5 cases fail and discriminating 2,5,2 cases pass
The gate can be run from the command line against two or more judged traces
The gate reports the rejected case ids and category dead rates
Existing validate, stats, evolve demo, and discrimination checks still pass

items.objective: Store short judge rationale in OpenMythos judged traces so failed or borderline cases can be repaired without inferring the failure mode from judge_score alone.
acceptance_criteria: judge.py can emit judge_score plus a short judge_reason field while preserving existing score-only behavior by default or compatibility
The reason prompt remains concise and bounded so local Ollama judging stays cheap
Existing report and discrimination scripts continue to work with judged traces that include judge_reason
A minimal demo or test proves judge_reason is written when enabled
No OpenAI key is required for the local Ollama validation path
